name: Bridge Crosses Partition

P1_z3_bridge_necessity.description: Fe present => I_c positive possible (SAT); Fe absent => I_c positive impossible (UNSAT)

P2_sympy_Fe_commutator.description: [XX x I, |000><000|] is non-zero: Fe generates dynamics from separable states

P3_sympy_Fi_product_evolution.description: Fi commutator is non-zero but evolved state remains product (X x I x Z on |000>)
P3_sympy_Fi_product_evolution.explanation: U_Fi|000> = (cos(t)|0> - i*sin(t)|1>) x |0> x |0> -- tensor product for all t

N1_sympy_Z_eigenstate.description: Z|0> = +|0>: the Z gate on q3 in |0> eigenstate acts as identity
N1_sympy_Z_eigenstate.implication: Fi = X x I x Z cannot entangle when q3 starts in Z eigenstate |0>

summary: Bridge crosses partition: Fe necessity SAT/UNSAT correct, Fe commutator nonzero=True, Fi product evolution verified, Z|0>=|0> confirmed
